tour.title: Player Controls
tour.content: Let's walk through every control in the player bar. Use Next to step through each group.

tour.title: Playback
tour.content: Play / Pause the song. The ⏪ 5s and 5s ⏩ buttons jump back or forward five seconds — useful for repeating a tricky riff.

tour.title: Arrangement
tour.content: Switch between Lead, Rhythm, Bass, and Vocals arrangements. Each has its own note chart and difficulty.

tour.title: Playback Speed
tour.content: Slow the song down to as little as 25 % to nail a fast run, then ramp back up to 100 % when you’re ready.

tour.title: Difficulty
tour.content: Filters out the hardest notes at lower values — great for beginners or when learning a new song section by section.

tour.title: Stem Mixer
tour.content: Click Stem Mixer to open per-stem volume sliders — guitar, bass, vocals, drums. Duck the guitar to 0 % to practice against the backing track.

tour.title: Visualization
tour.content: Swap the note highway renderer: Auto matches the arrangement type (guitar/bass/keys/vocals each get their own layout), Highway is the classic 2D scrolling view, and 3D Highway gives a full 3D perspective. Any additional installed viz plugins appear here too. The Quality dropdown (HD / Medium / Low) scales the render resolution — drop it if the highway feels slow.

tour.title: A / B Loop
tour.content: Press A at your loop start, B at the end — the song repeats that section indefinitely. Hit Save to name and store the loop for later.

tour.title: That’s everything
tour.content: You can revisit this guide any time from Controls in the nav, or click  ?  on this screen to run the tour again.
